nasb.text: I know Ephraim, and Israel is not hidden from Me; For now, O Ephraim, you have played the harlot, Israel has defiled itself.

esv.text: I know Ephraim, and Israel is not hidden from me; for now, O Ephraim, you have played the whore; Israel is defiled.

cnv.text: 我認識以法蓮，以色列也瞞不住我； 以法蓮啊！現在你竟行淫， 以色列竟玷污了自己。

ccb.text: 以法莲做了妓女，我一清二楚； 以色列玷污了自己，也瞒不过我。”
